description: Great support which was prompt and helpful from the beginning to the end.
author: Slavi S.
pros: Transfering 1200+ products from another platform is a life saver. All went well.
cons: A little bit complicated to adjust all required plugins for the transformation to start.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Cart2Cart: A User-Friendly and Reliable Platform
author: Hemendra S.
pros: I can't speak highly enough of Cart2Cart! We needed to switch our online store from PrestaShop to OpenCart, and Cart2Cart made it incredibly simple. The platform's user-friendly interface and clear instructions guided us through the migration process smoothly. All our data, including products, customers, and orders, were transferred accurately. Cart2Cart's customer support team was also responsive and helped us resolve a minor issue quickly. I would definitely use their services again!
cons: A little bit complicated to adjust all required plugins for the transformation to start.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: No results after months and no refund!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Wish there was something good about them, but there isn't
cons: Absolutely the worst company to deal with!! Took over 3 months to do an initial migration which was full of issues and ended up finishing it with another company. Event post migration we had to do a lot of work to sort out their data. It costed us thousands of £££ in damages. Took over 100 support emails back & forth, had to wait days for a response in most cases, always needed to chase several times. When we paid for a recent data migration which somehow was taking almost a week to migrate only ~1k entities. Had to stop it in the end & got it done by another provider under an hour. Now they're refusing to even refund the money. If you value your sanity and business, skip this one. Plenty of other platforms that do it properly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An Awesome Service With Even Better Customer Service! 10-Stars!
description: I have used it multiple times over the years for web stores large and small. I once migrated over 3000 products from a Joomla / Mijoshop setup into Shopify eCommerce and it was a VERY smooth process! This time I migrated a client from Squarespace to a WordPress WooCommerce setup. I had some bumps in the road this time around but the support guy [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] was always there waiting to help me, does he even sleep? Its been a great experience either way! I cant rate these guys highly enough!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I loved how easy it was to use. It took very little time to input the details of both sites and even gave me a general quote on price.
cons: The only thing that I think should be changed is the quote, it should include images as a default. Otherwise, there is not much I would change!
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Easily Migrated Products From Magento to Woocommerce
description: Avoided redoing a lot of work by migrating data from one cart to another.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It does exactly what it says it does - seemlessly migrates products, customers, and order data from one cart to another. We made a bad decision to go with Magento when it was far too much for what we needed - this allowed us to easily move our work over to Woocommerce and avoid having to do it all over again.
cons: I guess the only thing I can complain about is cost, everyone want's it cheaper. Other than that, I couldn't find any cons - mission accomplished.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Failure to deliver a successful migration
description: My experience with Cart2Cart is a total failure to deliver a successful migration service for my customer. I have tried three times, with guarantees from my account manager I would get a successful migration. My customer lost three days trading leading up to Christmas. And I spent 62 hours my time chasing Cart2Cart to resolve the migration issues over eight days. Your customer service team have been polite, but not truthful. Not providing an accurate response, that has caused stress and frustration. Lack of communication and no timescales to resolve issues has been a major issue. It seams Cart2Cart would be happy to keep on accepting money from me and still not delivery! Eight Days after the last migration attempt, I get an email from your so-called "Customer Success Team" to inform me "Price Per Unit" is still NOT fixed and that Cart2Cart is not able to support "Tier prices" between platforms. I have retained all correspondences to back up everything I am saying. The only solution left is a total refund due to "Total migration failure due to technical issue with incorrect mapping of Simple Products & Variable Products. Price Per Unit mapping not working. And non-support of tier prices between Magento and WooCommerce." The migration service for my customer will never be 100% successful with Cart2Cart, as result full refund is the only option left.
author: Nick B.
pros: Quick and simple WordPress Plugin installation and config.
cons: Lack of customisation for migration with Magento to WooCommerce
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I was looking for a plugin to migrate Prestashop to WooCommerce. I test many solutions, but this service is simply to install and run.
author: raffaele T.
pros: It's easy to use. I teste many software, plugins, etc. but this one work simple great!
cons: I don't understand if I can run the software once, or I can perform many syncs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

cons: Nothing I can think of. It's a little expensive, but if I hired someone to do transfer everything over it would have been much more expensive to do.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

pros: Moved customers, orders, products, and attributes from Volusion to Magento with no issues. Easily resynced migration about a week later to go live.
cons: I really didn't have any issues so I can't cite any cons. Price was acceptable, and support was great too.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

pros: Love the balance between automation and developer support to achieve a flawless migration
cons: none. my experience of the platform and interacting with customer services has been very good

description: Very useful when moving from one platform to another - saved me a lot of time and trouble.
author: Vanessa S.
pros: I was a little apprehensive about using this kind of service but having given the free trial a go I was more than happy to go ahead with the full purchase. I did come across a slight problem which I think was partly my fault at my end, but having contacted customer services they sent me a download of my database immediately - which brilliantly solved my issue. I was more than happy with this service and would recommend it and use it again if needs be.
cons: There was nothing i disliked about this software
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best migrating tool for e-commerce
description: I used this software for migrating a VirtueMart store to a WooCommerce store. I was a little scared in the beginning but after receiveng online support everything went by smoothly. I can migrate the whole store without losing products, customers and orders. I can even migrate products categories and coupons. Excellent!
author: Giancarlo M.
pros: The most valuable aspect of this software is the online support. A chat with real people who answer in real time. I had several doubts that they cleared promptly.
cons: As far as I'm concerned, there are no low points about this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: They are crooks who bait and switch and sell you a product they are incapable of delivering. I purchased extra options they didnt deliver. They drug their feet in offering solutions. I repeatedly asked for a refund because they blew my deadlines and I had to do this manually, but because they offered to continue working (and failing) they will not refund my money. CROOKS
author: Gerald W.
pros: This software doens't work beyond the simplest applications. If you have options, embedded images, html code in the description field, or other things that arent super simple, forget it.
cons: Everything. They sell a good pitch but it doesnt work and once they have your money, they will not issue refunds under any reason. Save your money and find another product or company with scruples.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We migrated from wix to shopify and did not expect to pay little money to complete the job with timely assistance of the cart2cart staff. There was an episode halfway, but with the help of the whole team, it was done in perfection. Its a good choice for small businesses cart migration with small budget. Small money gets things done so good, why not choose them?!

cons: Good so far. Why does it request at least 40 character when nothing dissatisfying...
